## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment

**macOS Host:**
- macOS Version: [e.g., 14.2 Sonoma]
- Mac Model: [e.g., MacBook Pro M3]
- Telemachus Version: [e.g., 1.0.0]

**Android Client:**
- Android Version: [e.g., Android 14]
- Device Model: [e.g., Samsung Galaxy Tab S9]
- Telemachus Version: [e.g., 1.0.0]

**Connection:**
- USB Cable: [e.g., USB-C to USB-C]
- Cable Quality: [e.g., Original Samsung cable]

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Logs

If applicable, add log output to help explain the problem. Remove pairing QR
codes, tokens, network addresses, device names, and private screen content
before posting. Report vulnerabilities through
[GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/aaditagrawal/telemachus/security/advisories/new).
